Interface OpenRpcMethod

All Superinterfaces:
Node, Visitable
All Known Subinterfaces:
OpenRpc13Method, OpenRpc14Method, OpenRpc1xMethod
All Known Implementing Classes:
OpenRpc13MethodImpl, OpenRpc14MethodImpl
public interface OpenRpcMethod extends Node
